initiatives.name: Everybody Reads Books
initiatives.description: A radical bookstore fostering mutual aid and community power through accessible literature and cultural programming in Lansing. They coordinate book access, educational resources, and solidarity networks while building power through community events, political education, and creating spaces for learning and movement building.

initiatives.name: Peace Education Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through peace education and nonviolent action in Lansing. They coordinate educational programs, direct action, and solidarity networks while building power through anti-war organizing, youth outreach, and creating spaces for peace and justice movement building.

initiatives.name: Punks With Lunch Lansing
initiatives.description: Punks With Lunch Lansing provides harm reduction services to marginalized or underserved individuals.

initiatives.name: The Rent Is Too Damn High - Lansing
initiatives.description: Organization advocating the government for rent control, public housing, and homeless services.

initiatives.name: Lansing for Palestine
initiatives.description: Lansing for Palestine focuses on community driven organizing to end US complicity in Israeli apartheid, settler colonialism and genocide.
